{{Quote|For Gellefon! For Starfire! For freedom!|Gellefon Freedom Fighters|<ref name="Poly86">{{PolyhedronCite|86|The New Republic Campaign: Preparing to Move Beyond the Movies}}</ref>}}
The '''Gellefon Freedom Fighters''' were a group of [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers from the planet [[Gellefon]] who had joined [[Aran Starfire]]'s bid to drive off the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence from their planet. They were extremely dedicated and had trained well. Aran demanded his followers learn all they could and conducted many of the training drills for the group himself. A select number of the Freedom Fighters had bonded with the native [[Gellbeast]]s and rode them into battle against the Imperials.
